calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-25-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori cheshire.
Petitioner: Maridith Jane Laughlin, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true and correct and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jane Maridith Church.
Decree signed in open court.
